*�����������������# me is this DAT.
# 
# par is the Par object that has changed.
# val is the current value.
# prev is the previous value.
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Parameter Execute DAT.

def valueChange(par, val, prev):
	op('autoRotate/reset').click(force=True)
	op('autoRotate').allowCooking = par.eval()
	return

def onPulse(par):
	parent.ArcBall.Reset()
	return

def expressionChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def exportChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def enableChange(par, val, prev):
	return

text.content:
2
*�����������������# me is this DAT.
# 
# panelValue is the PanelValue object that changed.
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Panel Execute DAT.

def offToOn(panelValue):
	valueName = panelValue.name
	panelOwner = panelValue.owner.panel
	ctrl = panelOwner.ctrl
	shift = panelOwner.shift
	u = panelOwner.u
	v = panelOwner.v
	if ctrl > 0:
		u = 0.5
	if shift > 0:
		v = 0.5
	if valueName not in ['u','v']:
		parent.ArcBall.StartTransform(btn=valueName, u=u, v=v)
	return

def whileOn(panelValue):
	valueName = panelValue.name
	panelOwner = panelValue.owner.panel
	ctrl = panelOwner.ctrl
	shift = panelOwner.shift
	transAmt = parent().par.Transmult
	dollyAmt = parent().par.Dolmult
	rotAmt = parent().par.Rotmult
	u = panelOwner.u
	v = panelOwner.v
	if ctrl > 0:
		u = 0.5
	if shift > 0:
		v = 0.5
	if valueName not in ['u','v']:
		if valueName == 'lselect':
			scaleAmt = rotAmt
		elif valueName == 'rselect':
			scaleAmt = transAmt
		else:
			scaleAmt = dollyAmt
		parent.ArcBall.Transform(btn=valueName, u=u, v=v, scaler=scaleAmt)

	return
